calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alma Soong for Patricia Foschi.

The Court noted that there is an issue with the language in the proposed order regarding the personal property. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.
